official_source_candidates.expected_use: Primary public discovery source for listed equities across Euronext markets.
official_source_candidates.expected_formats: html, possible embedded api/json/csv endpoints after inspection
official_source_candidates.target_fields: isin, symbol, name, market, venue/mic, instrument type, currency if available
official_source_candidates.risk: May require endpoint discovery from page assets or paginated requests.

official_source_candidates.expected_use: Fallback or segmentation source for markets such as Amsterdam, Brussels, Dublin, Lisbon, Milan, Oslo and Paris.
official_source_candidates.expected_formats: html, market-specific query endpoints if discoverable
official_source_candidates.target_fields: isin, symbol, name, market segment, exchange
official_source_candidates.risk: Potential overlap and duplicate listings across segments.

official_source_candidates.expected_use: Reference source for machine-readable daily CSV reference data if accessible or documented.
official_source_candidates.expected_formats: csv via Euronext Datashop/SFTP according to product documentation
official_source_candidates.target_fields: issuer, instrument, ISIN, market, instrument type, events if available
official_source_candidates.risk: May be commercial or gated; should not be assumed freely downloadable.

official_source_candidates.source_name: Euronext Static Reference Data - Equities & Bonds
official_source_candidates.expected_use: Secondary official reference data candidate if public documentation confirms useful equity coverage.
official_source_candidates.expected_formats: structured machine-readable reference data, access may be commercial/gated
official_source_candidates.target_fields: ISIN, instrument reference, corporate action mapping, instrument changes
official_source_candidates.risk: May include unlisted instruments and bonds; requires strict taxonomy filters.

taxonomy_rules.description: Include ordinary/common listed equities where the instrument type or market segment clearly identifies equity shares.
Exclude ETFs, ETNs, ETCs, funds, bonds, warrants, certificates, structured products and derivatives.
If instrument classification is ambiguous, do not add during rebuild; route to exclusions/manual review.

expected_outputs_next_phase: raw official pages or endpoint payloads
download manifest with status codes and checksums
candidate files stored without parsing decisions
validation_plan: Confirm source accessibility and official origin.
Identify whether a public export/API exists for all equities.
Detect pagination, markets, endpoint parameters and rate limits.
Verify required fields: ISIN, symbol/ticker, name, market/exchange, instrument type.
Measure gross rows and market distribution.
Validate taxonomy filters before any rebuild phase.
Estimate net-new overlap against expanded_universe_v2_14e only in validation phase, not in this plan phase.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Euronext public list may use dynamic endpoints not visible in static HTML.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: v2.15C should save both HTML and discovered JS/API references for later validation.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Reference data products may be gated/commercial.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Use public Euronext Live pages first; treat reference data product pages as documentation/fallback, not guaranteed input.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Overlap with Cboe Europe and Xetra may be significant.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: v2.15D must perform ISIN and exchange+ticker overlap checks before rebuild.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Non-equity instruments may be mixed into source lists.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Strict taxonomy: exclude ETF, ETN, ETC, funds, bonds, structured products and derivatives.
